caption: A person's hands hold a stack of sports trading cards over a table with a red and orange patterned surface. The hands shuffle through the cards, revealing different players. In the first frame, a thick stack of cards is held, with a "LUKA DONCIC" nameplate visible at the bottom. The next frame shows a shiny, red-patterned card featuring "CLINT CAPELA." The following frame reveals another red-patterned card for "Shai Gilgeous-Alexander," while the final frame shows a silver card of another player. In the background, a small inset window shows a man in a black shirt sitting at a desk. On-screen chat text includes a message from "Nightly" that reads, "CSA the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/nzaxX4S". Various logos and graphics are visible on the trading cards, including a stylized "M" emblem.
